name: pluglayer-codex-plugin
description: Deploy, operate, and troubleshoot PlugLayer apps from Codex using the PlugLayer MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Deploy apps to PlugLayer from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundle PlugLayer deployment skills with the PlugLayer MCP so Codex can inspect repos, deploy apps, diagnose failed deploys, and manage end-user infrastructure tasks.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this repo and tell me the safest PlugLayer deploy path.
Deploy this app to PlugLayer and report the public URL.
Check why this PlugLayer deployment failed and fix it.
